name: usage-rollups
description: Per-workspace daily usage rollups (calls, tokens) + estimated cost from a static rate map. 6-hour rollupDay cron upserts workspaceUsageDaily; workspaceUsage query feeds a per-day WorkspaceUsageCard scoped to the active workspace.
notes: Reads the existing `usage` table (by_ws_at index) — that table is provided by the app, not this slice. Cost is an ESTIMATE from a static RATES map in features/usageRollups/rates.ts (ponytail: a code map, not a table — swap to a table only if rates must be user-editable). Missing/stale model rates floor cost to 0 and flag hasRate=false. Consumer must add: the workspaceUsageDaily table (schema spread), the rollupDay cron line, and a nav entry rendering <WorkspaceUsageCard/>. rollupDay is bounded (<=1000 workspaces, <=5000 usage rows/ws/window); very high-volume windows may truncate — narrow the cron interval or paginate if that trips.
